t_ch: 刚才您不是说，翁法罗斯大灾将至吗？倘若如此，我和昔涟应该会一直留在哀丽秘榭才对，又怎会与形形色色的人相遇？
t_en: Didn't you say disaster would strike Amphoreus? If so, shouldn't Cyrene and I stay in Aedes Elysiae? How could we possibly meet all these people?

t_ch: 灾难终将过去。
t_en: Even the darkest storm must eventually pass.

t_ch: 还真是充满希望的回答…我喜欢。
t_en: That's... wonderfully optimistic. I like it.

t_ch: 或许是他们来到了哀丽秘榭。
t_en: Perhaps they'll come to Aedes Elysiae?

t_ch: 遗世独立的村落将成为人类最后的避难所啊…倒也合理。
t_en: Our secluded village as humanity's last haven... That makes sense.

t_ch: 灾难就是你踏上旅途的原因。
t_en: This calamity is what sets you on your journey.

t_ch: 如果是这样的话，那…哀丽秘榭的大家该由谁来保护呢？
t_en: If that's true, then... who will protect everyone in Aedes Elysiae?

t_ch: 昔涟，可以把那张「救世主」牌交给我吗？
t_en: Cyrene, may I have that "Deliverer" card?

t_ch: 当然可以。但，为什么？
t_en: Of course. But why?

t_ch: 尽管它所预示的那些声音、面相和愿望，对现在的我来说还太过遥远……
t_en: Although those voices, visages, and wishes may seem far away now...

t_ch: 但冥冥中总觉得有一个声音在呼唤我，希望我拿起它。又或许，我只有在拿起它之后，才能真正知道它的重量吧。
t_en: I can't ignore the sense that something is calling me, bidding me to take hold of it. Maybe... its true weight can only be known once it's in my grasp.

t_ch: 既然这样……
t_en: In that case...

t_ch: 接下这份礼物吧：神谕牌承载岁月，受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祝福……
t_en: Accept this gift: oracle cards carrying time's wisdom, blessed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 愿它能与你同行，化作你的记忆…激起未来的涟漪。
t_en: May they journey with you, become your memories... and spark rippling waves of change in times to come.

t_ch: …我会铭记在心。
t_en: I'll hold these words close to my heart.

t_ch: 嗳，不过…以现在的感受来看，好像和普通的纸牌也差不多嘛……
t_en: But... now that I'm holding them, they don't seem all that different from ordinary playing cards...

t_ch: 呀！这是……
t_en: What... what's happening?

t_ch: 大、大家，不好了迷！
t_en: E—Everyone, we've got big trouble memi!

t_ch: 烧焦的糊味，还有浓烟，好呛人…从迷境外面传来的呀！
t_en: Burning... smoke everywhere... It's all coming from beyond the Maze!

t_ch: …发生什么了？！
t_en: ...What's going on!?

t_ch: 不会错了…灾难已经萌芽，比我们预想中更快。
t_en: It's here... The seeds of disaster have already taken hold, sooner than we had foreseen.

t_ch: 而且，这一次…竟然就连{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}都无法抵御了哪。
t_en: This time... not even the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#} can shield us.

t_ch: 您、您的意思是…哀丽秘榭，也要被卷入预言中的浩劫了吗？
t_en: Y—You mean... Aedes Elysiae will be swept up in the prophesied catastrophe?

t_ch: 是啊……
t_en: I'm afraid so...

t_ch: 孩子们，请躲在迷路迷境里，不要踏出此地半步。否则，你们二人一定也会被那恐怖的灾厄吞噬哪。
t_en: My children, take shelter in the Membrance Maze. One step outside and this horror will consume you both.

t_ch: 可是，爸爸妈妈，还有村里的伙伴们……
t_en: But my parents... the whole village...

t_ch: 救人要紧，我们得出发了。
t_en: We need to save them — now.

t_ch: 是啊，救人要紧。村长大人，能否请您告诉我们，那灾厄的真面目究竟是什么，莫非是泰坦的力量？
t_en: You're right. Chief, what are we truly facing? Is this the power of a Titan?

t_ch: 「灾厄」…是泰坦的力量？
t_en: Is this "Calamity"... a Titan's doing?

t_ch: 「灾厄」…难道是传闻中的「灾厄」三泰坦么？
t_en: Are we facing the Three Titans of Calamity?

t_ch: 那并非泰坦，更非你们步步为营便足以应付的威胁。
t_en: This is beyond any Titan, beyond any danger you could overcome with strategy alone.

t_ch: 那是不可名状的丑恶之物，能将所有生命扭曲变作无血无泪的怪物。即便是泰坦也会被其侵蚀，自内向外烧熔殆尽，徒留一具只知杀戮、毁灭的空壳……
t_en: It's an unspeakable horror that twists all life into abominations that never bleed nor cry. Even Titans fall to its corruption, burning from within until only empty shells remain, knowing only death and destruction...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「黑潮」，这就是灾厄的真面目。它将吞噬世间万物，惟有迷路迷境能够幸免。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The "black tide." That's what this calamity truly is. It consumes all in its path, sparing none but the Membrance Maze.</color>

t_ch: 就连泰坦也……
t_en: Not even Titans can...

t_ch: 没错。所以，请你们不要冒险离开这片遭诸神忘却的遗落之境——你们是最初发现我们存在的人，也是唯二能够进入迷境的人……
t_en: Yes. So please, don't leave this forgotten realm the gods abandoned — you are the first to uncover our presence, and the only two who can enter the Maze...

t_ch: 我们…不希望你们白白牺牲。
t_en: We... don't wish for you to throw your lives away.
We...

t_ch: 怎么办，白厄？我们……
t_en: Phainon... what path do we take?

t_ch: 不要去，躲在迷境里吧。
t_en: Stay here, safe in the Maze.

t_ch: 只要活下去，就还会有希望……
t_en: As long as we survive, hope remains...

t_ch: 但…我明明才接下「救世主」牌，就选择对眼前的灾难坐视不理，这实在是……
t_en: But... I just accepted the "Deliverer" card. To idly sit by and ignore this calamity now would be...

t_ch: 交给自己的内心决定吧。
t_en: Listen to your heart.

t_ch: 我的内心……
t_en: My heart...

t_ch: 我的内心，那浮现出的唯一答案，是……
t_en: My heart knows but one path...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>去保护应被保护的人吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Protect those who must be protected.</color>

t_ch: …我学剑的本意，就是为了保护身边的人。如果在这种时候当了逃兵…就再也不配举剑了吧？
t_en: ...I learned the sword to protect those close to me. If I run now... I'll never be worthy of lifting a blade again.

t_ch: 看来，我们心里都已经得出答案了。
t_en: Then we know what we must do.

t_ch: 嗯，伙伴说得没错…我们必须挺身而出。
t_en: Indeed. Our friend is right... we must take action.

t_ch: 对不起，村长大人！哀丽秘榭陷入危机，身为她的孩子…我绝不能袖手旁观！
t_en: Forgive me, Chief! But Aedes Elysiae needs us... and as her child, I must act!

t_ch: …我明白了。你们…要保重自己哪。
t_en: ...Very well. Make sure you protect yourselves.

t_ch: 来吧，昔涟。来吧，伙伴——
t_en: With me, Cyrene. Join us, my friend—

t_ch: 即便没有剑，给我一把锄头也好…哪怕手头只有最粗糙的凡铁，我也要用它保卫家园！
t_en: Even without a sword, I'll take a rake! Even with the roughest steel, I'll keep our home safe!

t_ch: 「救世主」……
t_en: "Deliverer"...

t_ch: 原来如此…除了牌面上的解读，它还能拥有这层释义呀。
t_en: The card's truth extends beyond its mere literal meaning, there's another hidden layer within.

t_ch: 并非从一开始就完美无缺，站在高高的云端，将慈悲的目光投向整个世界……
t_en: Not someone perfect from the start, standing high above, casting merciful gazes upon the world...

t_ch: 而是以这一小步为起点，从一座宁静的小村庄出发，慢慢拓宽「心中的世界」，一边成长，一边救赎……
t_en: But one who starts small, from a humble village, expanding their "world within" step by step, learning to save others as they grow...

t_ch: 我们还小的时候，我对他说过：希望这个世界永远都不需要救世主……
t_en: When we were little, I told him I wished this world would never need a Deliverer...

t_ch: 但在心愿破灭的时候，我很庆幸…他愿意踏上这条道路。
t_en: Now that wish has shattered, yet I'm glad... he's chosen to walk this path.

t_ch: 而这……
t_en: And all of this...

t_ch: …都要归功于你的鼓舞呀，伙伴。
t_en: ...happened because you believed in him, friend.

t_ch: 走吧？必须有你在身旁，白厄…还有我。我们心底的勇气才能被唤醒。
t_en: Shall we? It's only when you're by our side that Phainon and I... that our hearts find their courage.

t_ch: 我知道，你在看着，对吗——未来的「大英雄」？
t_en: I know you're watching us right now... aren't you, "Great Hero" from the future?

t_ch: 「救世主」。
t_en: "Deliverer."

t_ch: 可惜，可叹——即便命运注定那少年要在未来背负起世界，他也无法成为带来拂晓的英雄。
t_en: Such cruel irony — though destined to bear the world's burden, this boy can never become the hero to bring forth the dawn.

t_ch: 你究竟在说什么…
t_en: What are you talking about...?

t_ch: 难道「救世」还得靠我吗？
t_en: Don't tell me... I'm the one who has to deliver salvation?

t_ch: 你是专程来剧透的吗？
t_en: Are you here just to spoil the story?

t_ch: 跟上他们吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。去见证那注定不得成为英雄的男人，在救世之路上迈出的第一步。
t_en: Follow their path, {NICKNAME}. Bear witness as this man, forever denied the mantle of hero, takes his first step on the path to Deliverance.

t_ch: 请用您的双眼将这段记忆见证至最后，将他<color=#dbc291ff>最初的结局</color>收入眼中……
t_en: Watch this memory play out its final act. See with your own eyes <color=#dbc291ff>how everything began</color>...

t_ch: 如此，你将理解他心中所谓「救世」的理想，为何会注定将这个世界埋葬。
t_en: Then you'll see why his dream of "Deliverance" was always destined to become this world's requiem.

t_ch: 血色的红日，枯萎的麦草，正在焚烧的村庄——
t_en: A sun red as blood, wheat fields turning to dust, and in the heart of it all, a village aflame—

t_ch: 此时此刻，少年仿佛正置身于世界的终点。
t_en: In that moment, the boy stood at what felt like the end of existence itself.

t_ch: 到处…都是怪物……
t_en: These creatures... they're everywhere...

t_ch: 大家…在哪里……
t_en: Someone... anyone... where are you...
Phai█ ███ █non █ ███ █

t_ch: …什么？
t_en: No... it can't be...
█Why █did██ █you█ ██ █?
Y—You...

t_ch: 你在…对我说话…？
t_en: Are you... talking to me?
Weren't█ we███ █best█ ██ friends█ ███ forever██ █?

t_ch: 啊…那条丝巾……
t_en: No... that ribbon...

t_ch: 莉维娅……
t_en: Livia... no...

t_ch: 果然…是你啊……
t_en: I should have known...

t_ch: 求求你求求你求求你求求你█ 你█ █你█ ███ ██ █ ██ ███ ████
t_en: Saaaaave uuuus Saaaaave █ us█ █us█ ███ ██ █ ██ ███ ████
Please... no...

t_ch: 不…不……
t_en: Stop... please stop...

t_ch: 莉维娅……
t_en: Oh, Livia... I'm so sorry...

t_ch: 还有…这些怪物……
t_en: And these monsters... they're all...
Ah...

t_ch: 为什么…为什么…？！
t_en: WHY... WHY IS THIS HAPPENING!?

t_ch: 黑潮来袭的那日，踟蹰的少年终于启程，与同伴一道奔向最初的战场。
t_en: When the black tide arrived, the wavering boy found resolve in his companions, and together they ran toward their first battlefield.

t_ch: 而遥远的未来，翁法罗斯的大地上，将铭刻英雄们的足迹：他会手握剑锋，在黄金的史诗里，镌写下不灭的诗篇。
t_en: In the far-off future, the land of Amphoreus would bear the marks of the heroes' footsteps: With sword in hand, he would inscribe, an eternal mark in the Golden Epic.

t_ch: 当第一缕光自地平线那端升起，满身伤痕的少年立于焦土，将罹难者逐一掩埋，沉默无言……
t_en: And when dawn broke over scorched earth, a boy, covered in wounds, buried the dead one by one, his silence heavier than the earth he moved...

t_ch: 一同他的故乡，他的过去，他的姓名。
t_en: His home. His past. His name. All buried beneath the soil.

t_ch: 单凭纤弱的双腿，他踏上旅途，翻过{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}，跨越{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}，穿行于{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}冰冷的死雾中……
t_en: His feet carried him forward. Over the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Pillar of Stone{RUBY_E#}. Beyond the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. Through the deadly fogs of the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 他走得茫无端绪，如同枯叶随风飘落。他走过无数城邦，刻下白发剑士的笑貌。
t_en: He wandered without direction, like a withered leaf drifting in the wind. Through countless city-states, the smiling visage of the white-haired swordsman was etched into memories.

t_ch: 他并非漫无目的。在少年心底，始终有一道呼声指引他前进：承应心愿，履险蹈危，只为行力所能及之事，拯救一切应被拯救的人。
t_en: Yet he did not walk without purpose. Deep in his heart, a voice always guided him forward to fulfill the wishes he had inherited, to brave peril, and to do all that was within his power to save those who needed saving.

t_ch: 一如启程之日，耳畔那位伙伴的声音……
t_en: Those words his friend spoke long ago, when his journey began lingered...

t_ch: 「『去保护应被保护的人吧。』」
t_en: "Protect those who must be protected."

t_ch: 那声音如是说。男人未曾犹豫，只是坚定践行。
t_en: The words were few. But they gave him all the certainty he needed.

t_ch: 「平庸之人应当如此，方才能做出不平庸的选择。」
t_en: "That's what it means to be ordinary and choose to be more."

t_ch: 他继续辗转，直到逐火的呼声响彻大地。在预言描绘的风景中，人类将战胜众神，摘得火种，为翁法罗斯带来新生的黎明。
t_en: Onward he walked until the call of the Flame-Chase Journey thundered across the land. In the vision painted by prophecy, humanity would triumph over the gods, seize the Coreflames, and ignite a new dawn for Amphoreus.

t_ch: 「『然而逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也当如尘埃般渺小。』」
t_en: "Yet losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, where life, too, seems as small as a speck of dust."

t_ch: 「『以「世界」为师者，方能背负它的命运——你可准备好了？』」
t_en: "Only one who treats the world as their teacher can bear its eventual destiny. Are you prepared for such teachings?"

t_ch: 心中的声音低语，他轻声回应。
t_en: The voice within spoke, and he answered softly.

t_ch: 「无妨。我的性命本就微不足道。」
t_en: "No matter. My existence is of no consequence."

t_ch: 他下定决心，响应「金织」号召，远赴圣城。可面对年轻的战士，元老们只面露不屑，冷笑间便将他投入军营。
t_en: When the Goldweaver called, he answered, traveling to the holy city. There, the Elders met his warrior's spirit with nothing but scorn, condemning him to the barracks in derision.

t_ch: 然而，令世人、就连他自己都未曾料想的是：这来历不明的新兵，会在不久之后的战役中大放异彩，一战成名……
t_en: No one saw it coming. Not the world, not even him. Yet, this nameless recruit stood at the gates of legend...

t_ch: 那也是他与生命中的一众旅伴，初次邂逅的时分。
t_en: And there, at last, he found the ones who would walk his path right beside him.

t_ch: （这里是，命运重渊……）
t_en: (This is... the Abyss of Fate...)

t_ch: （白厄也在。还有…万敌，缇宁？）
t_en: (Hold on. Phainon's here too? And is that Mydei and Trinnon?)

t_ch: 现在，「沉浸式戏剧」推进到了第二幕。
t_en: And now, Act Two of our immersive drama unfolds.

t_ch: 为什么要突然疏散整个命运三相殿……
t_en: They're evacuating the Temple? Why now?

t_ch: 你脑子坏了吗？那金色头发的可是悬锋城的王子！要是惹他生气了…整座城邦的人都得没命！
t_en: Are you insane? That blond man is the crown prince of Kremnos! Mess with him, and every last person in the city could wind up dead!

t_ch: 别慌张。有圣女大人主持场面，我们只要安心等待就好……
t_en: Calm yourselves. The Holy Maiden has everything under control. We need only wait patiently...

t_ch: 阁下所见的景象，发生在光历<unbreak>4926</unbreak>年的门关月。彼时，悬锋王子迈德漠斯率领的孤军兵临奥赫玛城下。
t_en: Behold! It is the Month of Gate, Light Calendar <unbreak>4926</unbreak>. The crown prince of Kremnos, Mydeimos, has led his forces to the gates of Okhema.

t_ch: 正如你所知，迈德漠斯性情高傲，但并非崇尚暴力之人。他向圣城元老提出角斗，只为给族人争取权利，不教他们以低人一等的姿态寄居他乡。
t_en: As you know, though Mydeimos was proud, he did not engage in needless violence. He challenged the elders of Okhema to a duel, not for glory, but for the rights and dignity of his people. To ensure they wouldn't live as second-class citizens in foreign lands.

t_ch: 在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄作为代表接受了迈德漠斯的挑战。这场「角斗」将改变逐火的进程……
t_en: After Aglaea's mediation, Phainon met Mydeimos's challenge as the elders' representative. This duel was to change the course of the Flame-Chase Journey itself...

t_ch: 所以，作为贯穿白厄一生的，最重要的伙伴，还请阁下继续见证他的记忆。
t_en: So, as Phainon's most important companion, his lifelong friend, please, continue to bear witness to his memories.

t_ch: …你们打算用这种方式代替光荣的角斗？
t_en: ...Is this your idea of an honorable duel?

t_ch: 打打杀杀，很不好。阿雅和*我们*，不想看见黄金裔伤害彼此。
t_en: Bloodshed isn't the way. We and Agy don't want to see Chrysos Heirs turn on each other.

t_ch: 真正的战士知道何时该放下武器。公正的{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}将主持这场对决，裁定胜负，你们只需要在它的天平上各自放置一样东西……
t_en: True warriors know when to sheathe their blades. The impartial {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} shall oversee this duel. You need only place your offerings upon their scales...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>比世界的命运，更为沉重之物。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Something that has more weight than the fate of the world.</color>

t_ch: 理解世界的重量，才有背负它的资格…是要以此称量我们的信念么？
t_en: Which means only those who understand the world's weight are worthy to carry it... Is this how you plan to test our convictions?

t_ch: 悬锋人，看来这一次，你最擅长的暴力派不上用场了。
t_en: Well, Kremnoan, looks like you won't be able to punch your way through this one.

t_ch: 无所谓。新兵，最后给你个机会：转身离开，我会承诺放你一条生路。
t_en: It makes no difference. One last chance, new recruit. Walk away, and I'll spare your life.

t_ch: 否则——就跟上来，直面我，我会赐你一个与勇气相称的结局！
t_en: Otherwise — come and face me! I'll give you a warrior's death!

t_ch: （这两人以前这么水火不容啊……）
t_en: (Hard to imagine they once clashed like this...)

t_ch: 圣女大人，我总觉得自己误入了一场政治游戏。
t_en: Holy Maiden, I can't help but feel like a pawn that has stumbled into some greater political game.

t_ch: 每个英雄都曾是孩子，也都会长大。
t_en: Every hero was once a child. And every child must grow.

t_ch: 是么？可我连自己为什么站在这里，都不太确定。
t_en: That so? I don't even know why I'm standing here right now.

t_ch: 我只是一介士兵。如果不是非要以剑技分个高下，「金织」女士大可亲自出战。要论誓死保卫圣城的意志，我怎可能比得过她？
t_en: Look at me, just a common soldier. If it weren't a contest of swords, Lady Goldweaver would've taken the fight herself. When it comes to dying for the holy city, how could I ever measure up to her?

t_ch: 如果*我们*说，这场对决的意义不在胜负，而在于你的选择呢？
t_en: What if we told you this duel isn't about winning or losing, but rather in the choice you make?

t_ch: 您的意思是，这是「金织」女士对我的考验吗？
t_en: Are you saying that Lady Goldweaver is testing me?

t_ch: 对于逐火之旅，每一位黄金裔都不可或缺。无论是你，还是那位悬锋的王子，都浮现在神谕描绘的图景里。
t_en: Every Chrysos Heir is indispensable to the Flame-Chase Journey. And you and the crown prince of Kremnos are both a part of the prophecy.

t_ch: 这场角斗并非结束，而是开始。所以，听从你<color=#dbc291ff>内心的声音</color>吧，*我们*期待的只是你的回答。
t_en: What the duel marks is not an ending, but a beginning. So, listen to your heart. We wish only to hear your answer.

t_ch: 也对，内心的声音，它一直是我的指引。无论结果如何，我都会全力以赴。
t_en: True enough... The voice within has never failed me. It doesn't matter what the result is... I'll give it everything I have.

t_ch: 这才是黄金裔应有的态度。去吧，白厄，你的旅程才刚刚开始。
t_en: Spoken like a Chrysos Heir. Now go, Phainon, your journey has only just begun.

t_ch: 就是这样，战友。我们得齐心协力，一同战胜那位傲慢的王子咯。
t_en: That's right, comrade! It's time for us to teach that proud prince a lesson together!

t_ch: 走吧，我们一定能赢。
t_en: C'mon, we've got this.

t_ch: 哈哈，干脆利落的回答！就该这么自信。
t_en: Haha! Now that's what I like to hear!

t_ch: 日后你们也会成为战友。
t_en: Someday, he too will be your comrade.

t_ch: …我？跟他？哈，别开玩笑了，朋友……
t_en: Me? With him? Pfft, don't joke around like that...

t_ch: 如果输了，该怎么办？
t_en: What if we lose?

t_ch: 呃…那也只能等输了再看。
t_en: Well... if we lose, we'll find out, won't we?

t_ch: 不过，说回命运三相殿……
t_en: Still, on the topic of the Temple of the Three Fates...

t_ch: 这里就是「岁月」泰坦的神殿啊，也不知道昔涟的求学之路是否顺利…自从踏上旅程，我们就很少联系对方了……
t_en: Here we are, at the temple of the Time Titan, and I don't even know how Cyrene's studies are progressing... We haven't really had much contact since I set out...

t_ch: 希望她一切安好。走吧，战友，能一睹塔兰顿的公正天秤，这机会可不多啊。
t_en: Still, I hope she's doing well. Anyway, let's go, comrade. It's not every day you get a chance to see Talanton's Scales of Justice.

t_ch: （怎么回事……）
t_en: (What's going on...)

t_ch: （他刚才说，昔涟在这里求学？这怎么可能？她不是早就……）
t_en: (Did he just say Cyrene's studying here? But how is that possible? Wasn't she...)

t_ch: （偏偏在最需要解释的时候玩失踪吗，来古士……）
t_en: (Of course Lygus disappears right when I need answers...)

t_ch: 算了，先跟上白厄吧。
t_en: Forget it, I need to catch up with Phainon first.

t_ch: 真是宏伟。即便{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}已经陨落，它的天平仍在履行称量万物的使命。
t_en: Amazing. {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} may have fallen, but their scales remain true to their purpose.

t_ch: 希望你还记得自己的使命，新兵。
t_en: I hope you still remember your purpose, new recruit.

t_ch: 一副成竹在胸的样子啊，悬锋人。不如透露一下，你打算如何诠释「沉重」二字？
t_en: You seem awfully confident, Kremnoan. Let's see how you define the idea of "weight."

t_ch: 怕你不知情，我多嘴一句：在悬锋城，你这小偷般的发言已是对角斗的亵渎，当受穿刺之刑。
t_en: For your information, in Castrum Kremnos, the punishment for profaning a duel with such crooked words is impalement.

t_ch: 但这里是外邦，客随主便，我告诉你也无妨——
t_en: But as we're in foreign lands, I'll indulge you—

t_ch: 悬锋印戒，我族的至宝。它就是我的选择。
t_en: The Signet of Kremnos, the crown jewel of our people. That's my choice.

t_ch: 一枚戒指？恐怕不是普通的饰品吧。说说看，这小东西背后有什么故事？
t_en: A ring? Not just any ornament, I'd wager. What's the story behind this little treasure?

t_ch: ——得寸进尺，真以为我会对你滔滔不绝？
t_en: Don't push your luck. Think I'd pour my heart out to you?

t_ch: 你只需知道，悬锋千年的荣耀，足以令一位泰坦为之倾倒，碾碎你这无名小卒的灵魂！
t_en: Just know that Kremnos's thousand years of glory could bring a Titan to its knees, let alone a nobody like you!

t_ch: 看来在他心中，比世界更重要的，是族人和荣耀……
t_en: So to him, glory and his people outweigh the entire world...

t_ch: （这也是日后，万敌背负的宿命……）
t_en: (And the very destiny that Mydei himself will eventually shoulder...)

t_ch: 别想太多，白厄。遵从自己的内心吧。
t_en: Don't overthink it, Phainon. Trust your heart.

t_ch: 话虽如此，我只是一介圣城卫士，而对面是身经百战的悬锋王子……
t_en: That's easy for you to say. I'm just a Holy City Guard, up against Kremnos's walking war machine of a prince...

t_ch: 差距也太大了吧…！
t_en: ...Don't you think this is a little bit too unfair!?

t_ch: 你要去哪，战友？
t_en: Where are you going, comrade?

t_ch: 回来吧，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
t_en: Come back. We need to decide this here and now.

t_ch: 真为难啊。那枚戒指肯定承载了许多特别的意义，该用什么来和他对抗？
t_en: Now this is a tough one. What can I possibly offer against a ring that signifies so much?

t_ch: 战友，我想听听你的直觉。
t_en: Well, comrade? What does your gut tell you?

t_ch: 「救世主」牌…
t_en: The "Deliverer" card...

t_ch: …果然，你也是这么想的。
t_en: ...Looks like we really are on the same wavelength.

t_ch: 手中的长剑…
t_en: The blade you carry...

t_ch: 这柄长剑随我征战至今。总有一天，我会用它写下英雄的诗篇……
t_en: This sword has been with me through every battle. One day, it'll help write a heroic epic...

t_ch: 但不是现在。我还年轻，要走的路还很长，它也一样。
t_en: But not today. I'm still young, and I have a long road ahead. So does this blade.

t_ch: 坚定的决心…
t_en: A heart of steel...

t_ch: 心中的信念吗？可是，空有决心是不够的，除非把我的心脏献上……
t_en: You mean my conviction? But... just resolve isn't enough, is it? Unless I literally gave my heart...

t_ch: 怎么可能，只有哀地里亚人会干这种事吧。
t_en: Ha! No way. Only an Aidonian would do something that crazy.

t_ch: 思来想去，我能仰仗的也只有它了……
t_en: In the end, there's only one thing I can trust...

t_ch: 那一日，出现在我人生中的「救世主」。说来讽刺，我至今都不敢直视这张牌，更遑论接受它的指引。
t_en: The "Deliverer" that appeared in my life on that day... How ironic. I can't even look at this card properly, much less follow where it leads.

t_ch: 光是想起故乡被黑潮吞没的景象，双手就颤抖不已。我忘不了那场大火，人们的哭喊，我无能为力，什么也保护不了……
t_en: Just thinking about how my village was swallowed by the black tide makes my hands shake. The flames, the screams, my utter failure to protect anyone...

t_ch: 理智告诉我，这些还远远不够。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，在翁法罗斯面前，它的消逝不过是一道无足轻重的伤疤。
t_en: Speaking rationally, I know it's not nearly enough. Aedes Elysiae was just a small village, its loss barely a scar on Amphoreus's face.

t_ch: 可此时此刻，我心中的声音却在诉说……
t_en: But here and now, my heart says something else...

t_ch: 这张牌就是我剩下的全部，不会有什么比它更沉重了。
t_en: This card... It's everything I have left. Nothing weighs heavier.

t_ch: 也许，这就是正确答案呢。
t_en: Perhaps that itself is the answer.

t_ch: 啊，白厄……
t_en: Look, Phainon...

t_ch: 好久不见，缇宁大人，白厄，还有……
t_en: It's so nice to see you all again! Lady Trinnon, Phainon, and...

t_ch: 嗨，看见你在，真令人开心♪
t_en: Hello! Seeing you here sure is a sweet surprise♪

t_ch: 昔涟？你怎么在这里…
t_en: Cyrene? But how...

t_ch: 这还是我认识的翁法罗斯吗？
t_en: Did I stumble into the wrong Amphoreus?

t_ch: 怎么一副难以置信的表情，难道是…想我了？
t_en: Why so surprised? Could it be... did you miss me?

t_ch: …昔涟？
t_en: Cyrene?

t_ch: 这可真是…我刚刚还在想，你是不是也在神殿里，没想到重逢来得这么突然。
t_en: This is... incredible. I was literally just thinking about how you might be here, but I never imagined I'd see you this soon.

t_ch: 嘻，我本该跟着祭司一起撤离的，但听说圣女大人身边有一位白发青年……
t_en: Hehe, I was supposed to leave with the priests, but then I heard Lady Maiden was with a white-haired young man...

t_ch: 我猜到是你，就趁着人们不注意，偷偷溜回来啦。
t_en: I figured it had to be you, so I snuck back here!

t_ch: 呵…像是你的作风。可惜现在不是叙旧的时间，那边的悬锋人……
t_en: Ha... That's Cyrene for you. Unfortunately, this isn't a good time for reminiscing. That Kremnoan over there...

t_ch: 还在玩过家家的游戏么？
t_en: Still playing house, boy?

t_ch: …如你所见。
t_en: ...You get the idea.

t_ch: 是个心急的大男孩呀，你们说不定很合拍呢。
t_en: Quite the hothead. Y'know, you two just might get along.

t_ch: 别怕，你已经有答案了，不是么？
t_en: Don't worry. You already know what the answer is, don't you?

t_ch: 如果这张牌就是你的选择，我支持你。
t_en: If that's your choice, I am with you.

t_ch: 因为我也忘不了哀丽秘榭的田野、红叶，树下有我的小秋千，我会在上面做甜甜的梦。还有迷路迷境的小妖精们，想到再也见不到它们，心就会很痛很痛……
t_en: I am with you because I remember it all too. The fields of Aedes Elysiae, those red leaves, that little swing of mine beneath the tree where I'd dream the sweetest dreams. And those dear fairies in the Lost Maze... It hurts so much knowing they're gone forever...

t_ch: 这份悲伤不会骗人。我们的故乡只是个小村庄，但对于小小的你和我，它就是整个世界。
t_en: The pain speaks for itself. Our hometown may have been just a tiny village, but to us, it was the whole world.

t_ch: 可是，白厄，只靠这些还不够。
t_en: But... that's not enough, Phainon. Not nearly enough.

t_ch: 仇恨是能让人长大，让男孩成为坚不可摧的战士。
t_en: Even though hatred can help people grow, and turn a boy into an unbreakable warrior...

t_ch: 但你现在需要的，是一场胜利。那就不能只把沉痛的过去当作砝码……
t_en: What you need now is victory. You can't just stack the scales with your past suffering...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而是要把「未来」的重量，也压在天秤上。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You have to throw the weight of your "future" onto them as well.</color>

t_ch: 未来…是什么意思？
t_en: The future...? What do you mean?

t_ch: 好像说了很难懂的话呢，其实很简单啦。
t_en: Maybe that was a bit too cryptic for you, but it's actually really simple!

t_ch: 就让我们共同的伙伴，带着「救世主」一起走上天平吧？
t_en: Why not have our mutual friend here stand on the scales with the "Deliverer"?

t_ch: 可以拜托你吗？
t_en: How about it? Can you help us?

t_ch: 嗯，毕竟…你可是我们的憧憬呀。
t_en: Of course, after all... you're what we aspire to.

t_ch: 这不算作弊吗？
t_en: Wouldn't that be cheating?

t_ch: 嘻，放心吧。我敢打赌，那位王储不会发现的~
t_en: Hehe, relax, our dear crown prince won't have a clue~

t_ch: …无论如何，试试看吧。
t_en: ...Let's try that.

t_ch: 这场角斗关乎圣城的明天，既然站在这里，我就要为它摘得胜利。
t_en: The fate of Okhema hangs on this duel. I must claim victory, for their sake.

t_ch: 我会押上自己的一切。战友，与我一同，成为英雄吧。
t_en: I will stake everything I have. Stand with me, comrade, and we shall become heroes.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>铭记过去，成为明天的英雄吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow.</color>

t_ch: 没错，我们会尽己所能将其诠释：比世界的命运更为沉重之物……
t_en: Let's. Together we'll prove that what weighs more than the fate of the world...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是带着无法被改变的过往，背负它走向未来的决心。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Is the resolve to shoulder an immutable past, and carry it into the future.</color>

t_ch: 公平、正义、清白无疑的{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，角斗者已做出他们的选择——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, the fair, the just, they of unassailable integrity — the challengers have made their choices.

t_ch: 以三相圣女之名：现在，我请你垂落秤盘，称量命运，为我们揭示你的宣判！
t_en: In the name of the Holy Maiden of the Three Fates, lower your scales, weigh destiny, and reveal unto us your verdict!

t_ch: 你用来称重的信物是…一张纸牌？
t_en: Your offering is... a card?

t_ch: 对，一张薄薄的纸牌，这就是我的选择——你只需知道，它的名字叫「救世主」。
t_en: Yes, a flimsy little card. That is my choice. Just know that it's called the "Deliverer."

t_ch: 有意思。好啊——若你能凭这一张纸牌胜过我，今后，我就用这三个字来称呼你！
t_en: Interesting. Very well — if you can beat me with this card, then that's what I'll call you from now on!

t_ch: 一言为定。
t_en: It's a deal.

t_ch: 天平，在犹豫……
t_en: The scales... they're wavering...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}正在斟酌判决，看来两边的信念…不相上下。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} is deliberating on the outcome. It appears the convictions of both sides are... equally matched.

t_ch: 真是…令人窒息，仿佛整个世界的重量都压在了肩头。
t_en: This is... suffocating. Like the whole world's weight is on my shoulders.

t_ch: 但我相信…内心的声音……
t_en: But I believe... what my heart tells me...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 来了么？
t_en: Finally decided?

t_ch: 「听啊，人子：吾将宣告判决，高下已分。」
t_en: "Hear thee, children of humanity: I shall pronounce judgment, for the difference is now clear."

t_ch: 「供物比世界的命运更为沉重之人，是为——」
t_en: "The one whose offering weighs more than the fate of the world is—"

t_ch: 「——哀丽秘榭的来者，无名的英雄。」
t_en: "One from Aedes Elysiae, the Nameless Hero."

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「然而，谨记——」
t_en: "However, heed this..."

t_ch: 「信念的重量并非源于自身——」
t_en: "The true weight of conviction originates not from itself..."

t_ch: 「——而在那压落秤盘之物，夙愿本身。」
t_en: "...but rather in that which tips the scales, hope itself."

t_ch: 这是什么意思？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean?

t_ch: 我想，泰坦的意思是，比世界命运更沉重的不是个人的信念。
t_en: I think the Titan means that it's not anyone's personal convictions that outweigh the fate of the world.

t_ch: 而是一种愿望，它属于我、你、在场的每个人。压落秤盘的并非白厄的决心，而是这张神谕牌承载的，世人对「救世主」的呼唤——
t_en: It's about a wish, one which we all share — you, me, everyone here. What tipped the scales wasn't Phainon's conviction alone, but the collective hopes carried by this oracle card — humanity's desperate call for a Deliverer.

t_ch: 那其中也包括你和你的民族，悬锋人。
t_en: Yes, even you and your people, Kremnoan.

t_ch: 将两边的重量一起押上么？但别忘了，悬锋人和你们是死敌，沉溺于理想主义，只会让你惨死在敌军的矛下。
t_en: Placing us both on the same side of the scales? Foolish. We Kremnoans are your mortal enemies. Such weak idealism will only get you skewered on our spears.

t_ch: 那也无妨，我可从没说过，自己能和牌中的「救世主」划等号。
t_en: Fine by me. I've never claimed to be the Deliverer from the card anyway.

t_ch: 我只是一介士兵，如果战死沙场就是我的命运，我毫无怨言，只会挥剑至最后一刻。我相信，你也一样……
t_en: I'm a soldier, and if it's my fate to bleed my last on the battlefield, then so be it. I'll fight to my last breath. And on this, I know that we're the same...

t_ch: 所谓的「英雄」，只是怀抱如此决心的一群人。而「救世主」——就是他们的总和，仅此而已。
t_en: That's all a "hero" really is. Someone with that kind of conviction. And the "Deliverer"? Just the sum of all those heroes.

t_ch: 精彩的回答。
t_en: A brilliant explanation.

t_ch: 诚如神谕所示：「逐火的征途将于今日，迎来最后两位英雄。」
t_en: Just as prophesied: "On this day, the final two heroes shall join the Flame-Chase Journey."

t_ch: …呵，果然你的目标从一开始就是我和他。人们都说「金织」大小姐不知天高地厚，可妄想用神谕劝服悬锋战士的，你还是头一个。
t_en: I should have known from the start. They all say Lady Goldweaver is quite brazen, but you're the first to even imagine that prophecies could persuade a Kremnos warrior.

t_ch: 要想束缚雄狮，我有千种办法。但眼前这头狮子本就不为厮杀而来，不是么？
t_en: Oh, I have a thousand ways to tame a lion. But this lion didn't come here for bloodshed, did he?

t_ch: 奥赫玛和悬锋孤军实力悬殊，可我方竟无一人阵亡，这恐怕并非巧合吧。
t_en: The Kremnoans far outmatch Okhema's forces, yet we haven't lost a single soul. That's no accident, is it?

t_ch: 你们当真觉得，好战的悬锋人会手下留情？
t_en: Do you honestly think Kremnoans, renowned for our love of battle, would show mercy?

t_ch: 但悬锋孤军同样也以军纪严明著称。
t_en: Your forces are equally renowned for their iron discipline.

t_ch: *我们*只能认为，这是你的命令。
t_en: And so, we can only assume that this is on your orders.

t_ch: 看来奥赫玛也不像传闻中那么迂腐。比起圣城元老，在场各位更理解力量的本质。
t_en: Perhaps Okhema isn't as hidebound as the rumors say. You grasp the true marrow of power more clearly than those Elders.

t_ch: 命运已经付诸实现，何不让我们设宴迎宾，为这场相逢再添一笔？
t_en: Now that the wheels of fate are turning, what finer way to celebrate this fortuitous encounter than a feast?

t_ch: 请随我来，两位异乡的战士——这世上的英雄多如繁星，而此刻，我们被长夜的火光聚集在一起……
t_en: Follow me, brave outlanders — heroes of this world are as countless as the stars, and at this moment, we find ourselves gathered here by the light of the flames of the long night...

t_ch: 历史会记下这一刻，神谕中的黄金裔已悉数就位，它喻示着翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明。
t_en: History shall remember this moment. The prophesied Chrysos Heirs now stand assembled, heralding a new dawn for Amphoreus.

t_ch: 想必阁下已经意识到：方才这一幕，与您经历的逐火之旅截然不同。
t_en: You must see it now... How different this is from the Flame-Chase Journey you traveled.

t_ch: 你刚才去哪儿了？
t_en: Where did you disappear to?

t_ch: 只是暂且退居幕后，以免打扰您的沉浸。
t_en: I merely stepped backstage, so as not to disrupt your immersion.

t_ch: 这究竟是谁的记忆…
t_en: Just whose memories are these...?

t_ch: 我扮演的，到底是什么人？
t_en: And whose role am I playing?

t_ch: 也许并非真实存在的「某个人」。毕竟除了两个特定的人，其他英雄似乎意识不到您的存在。
t_en: "Who"? Perhaps the role is not that of a person who really existed. Notice how only two particular individuals seem aware of your presence?

t_ch: 切莫心急，剧目已经接近尾声。
t_en: Patience. We're approaching the final act.

t_ch: 我说过，这是男人最初的记忆。对于即将到来的「再创世」，它的意义尤为特殊。
t_en: These are, as I mentioned, his first memories. They are of particular importance for the imminent Era Nova.

t_ch: 恰如此时此刻，在塔兰顿的见证下，预言中的半神悉数集结……
t_en: Such as this very moment, as the prophesized demigods gather with Talanton as witness...

t_ch: 这是神明计算中的时刻。此后的旅途，与您熟知的一切并无区别。有人到来，有人离去，逐火者们身负微光，在长夜中艰难向前。
t_en: This is a moment calculated by the gods. What comes after is no different from that which you already know. Some join, others leave, while Flame-Chasers bear their faint light forward through the long night.

t_ch: 来吧，您的席位已经备好，敬请落座：十三次心跳后——
t_en: Come, come, your seat awaits. After thirteen heartbeats—

t_ch: 英雄们的航船，将摆渡至最后一幕。
t_en: Our heroes will be ferried to the final scene.

t_ch: 他们说，这世上的英雄，本该和天上的繁星一样多……
t_en: They say that the heroes of this world should be as countless as the stars...

t_ch: 可如今，却只剩下我们了啊。
t_en: Yet now, we're the only ones left standing.

t_ch: 黑潮，终究还是席卷了世界……
t_en: So, in the end, the black tide still swallowed everything...

t_ch: 西方有悬锋孤军坐镇，短时间内不会失守。那刻夏老师生前在北方和东方布下法阵，作用犹未可知，但我相信他。至于奥赫玛……
t_en: The west stands protected by Mydei's Kremnoans. It will hold for the time being. Professor Anaxa deployed wards in the north and east before... Their effectiveness is untested, but I believe in him. And Okhema...

t_ch: 不必担心阿格莱雅。即便身陨，她也是最为高贵的半神，「浪漫」的结网坚不可摧，圣城公民也响应她的遗愿，纷纷投身到保卫战中。
t_en: We needn't fear for Aglaea. Even in death, she counts as the greatest among demigods. Her threads of "Romance" weave an impenetrable shield, and the people answer her call, rallying to the city's defense.

t_ch: 动身吧，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}已献出它的火种。为了翁法罗斯，我们必须在下一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}前完成「再创世」！
t_en: Let's move. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has given their Coreflame. We must complete the Era Nova before the next {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}... for Amphoreus!

t_ch: 只剩三个小时了啊……
t_en: That only leaves three hours...

t_ch: 所以，这是我们看{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}她{RUBY_E#}的最后一眼了。
t_en: So... this is the last time we'll see {RUBY_B#Okhema}her{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 白厄……
t_en: Phainon...

t_ch: 我们是为了回应世界的愿望而启程的，对吧？
t_en: We set out on this journey to answer the world's desire, didn't we?

t_ch: 每一位黄金裔都是如此，从未改变。
t_en: That's what it means to be a Chrysos Heir. So has it always been.

t_ch: 那，为什么……
t_en: Then why...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
t_en: ...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?

t_ch: 明明在每一个正确的时间点，大家已经尽己所能，做出了最正确的选择。
t_en: We made the best choices we could, whenever we could!

t_ch: 可到头来，指引我们的神谕，吞没世界的黑潮……
t_en: But in the end... the prophecy that led us... this black tide swallowing everything...

t_ch: 为什么，是这种样子呢？
t_en: Why does it look like this?

t_ch: 我…不知道。
t_en: I... I don't know.

t_ch: 但除了向前，我们早已别无选择。
t_en: But we haven't had any other choice... except to move forward. Not for a long time now.

t_ch: 即便前方是漫漫长夜，我也相信…那是黎明的方向。在火光的尽头，是终将升起的烈阳。
t_en: Even if we only see the long, long night ahead, I still believe... that through it, we'll find the dawn on the other side. Beyond these flames, a new sun will someday rise.

t_ch: 所以，走吧，去命运三相殿！由你接过「岁月」的权柄，让全部的火种回归涡心，为此世的命运划上休止符。
t_en: So, to the Temple of the Three Fates! You'll take over Time's authority, and we'll return all the Coreflames to the Vortex, then put this world's fate to its final rest.

t_ch: 随后，让我们所有人为灭亡预备……
t_en: After which, we shall all face oblivion...

t_ch: 或是踏上最后的伟大征程。
t_en: ...or embark on one final grand journey.

t_ch: *模糊的呢喃*
t_en: *Indistinct mutters*

t_ch: 为搅扰您的沉眠向您致歉，欧洛尼斯。
t_en: Please forgive us for disturbing your sleep, Oronyx.

t_ch: 无妨。我明白，命运已抵达尽头了。
t_en: It matters not. I know, fate has run its course.

t_ch: 黑潮已临奥赫玛城下，翁法罗斯的时间所剩无几……
t_en: The black tide has reached Okhema. Amphoreus does not have much time left...

t_ch: 「再创世」的时刻到了。
t_en: It is time for the Era Nova.

t_ch: 我会如约呈上「岁月」的火种……
t_en: As agreed, I shall present the Coreflame of Time...

t_ch: 乘上时间的长河吧，它会挺身护送各位，抵达创世涡心……
t_en: Ride the river of time. It will guard your passage to the Vortex of Genesis...

t_ch: 步入其中，见证吧。
t_en: Step through, and witness.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师用生命证明了创世并非空谈。身为神谕中的黄金裔，我们将为世界燃烧自己的结局也早已注定……
t_en: Professor Anaxa proved the truth of Genesis with his sacrifice. As Chrysos Heirs of the prophecy, we were always destined to immolate ourselves for this world...

t_ch: 现在，轮到我们献身了——别让大家的牺牲白费。
t_en: Now it's our turn — we can't let everyone's sacrifices be in vain.

t_ch: 不用再和我确认决心啦，白厄。
t_en: I don't need another pep talk, Phainon.

t_ch: 从走出村子的那一刻起，我们就做好反抗命运的准备了，不是吗？
t_en: After all, we've been ready to fight fate ever since we left the village, haven't we?
...Yeah.

t_ch: 来吧：让我们拥抱神谕所言的奇迹，烧尽这世界上所有的污秽……
t_en: Come, let's claim the miracle we were promised, and burn away every last shadow in this world...

t_ch: 然后…再成为照亮新世界的第一缕火光。
t_en: And then... rise as the first light of a new world.

t_ch: 光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年，长夜月的第三个七天。{NICKNAME}阁下，欢迎抵达逐火的尽头……
t_en: Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>, the third week of the Month of Evernight. Welcome, my {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}, to the end of the Flame-Chase...

t_ch: 以及，世界的终结。
t_en: ...and the end of all things.

t_ch: 现在，泰坦已然揭示了命运的入口，敬请阁下踏入其中，一睹为快。
t_en: The Titan has revealed the gateway of fate. Please, accept the invitation to step across the threshold, and behold!

t_ch: 这扇门的背后，就是英雄们苦苦追寻的新世界。也是这段漫长记忆的主人，一生行向的终点……
t_en: Beyond this gate lies the new world that our heroes sought through their trials, as well as the terminus that the owner of these long memories has been hurtling towards their entire life...

t_ch: 或许，会是您无比熟悉的场景。
t_en: Perhaps you'll find it... all too familiar.

t_ch: 而后，您就能理解，那名为「白厄」的凡人是如何背负世界的重量。而那重量又是如何将他压迫，并且证明……
t_en: Then you'll understand how the mortal called "Phainon" shouldered the world's weight. How that same burden crushed him, proving...

t_ch: 所谓的「救世主」，不过是翁法罗斯误以为自己能够反抗命运，一厢情愿的可悲幻觉哪。
t_en: ...that the so-called "Deliverer" is nothing more than Amphoreus's own delusion, a pitiful fantasy that it could defy fate's decree.

t_ch: 阁下，请。您所探寻的真相，就在这未至的岁月中。
t_en: Please, esteemed one, the answers you seek lie in these nonexistent times.

t_ch: 由泰坦揭示的未来……
t_en: The future revealed by the Titan...

t_ch: 我们…会看到什么？
t_en: Just what... will we see?

t_ch: （创世涡心…果然是这里。可是……）
t_en: (The Vortex of Genesis... So it is here. But...)

t_ch: （这究竟是……）
t_en: (Just what is this...?)

t_ch: 「人生不过是个行走的影子，一个在舞台上指手画脚的伶人，登场片刻，就在悄无声息中退下。」
t_en: "Life's but a walking shadow, a poor player, that struts and frets his hour upon the stage, and then is heard no more."

t_ch: 「它是一个愚人讲述的故事，充满喧哗与骚动，却找不到一点意义。」
t_en: "It is a tale, told by an idiot, full of sound and fury, signifying nothing."

t_ch: 创世涡心，世界的起点与终点，作为谢幕的舞台再合适不过。阁下，我恳请您继续前进，端举着跃动的好奇心。
t_en: The Vortex of Genesis, where the world begins and ends. What stage could be more befitting of our final act? Come, come, come, I beseech you onward, buoyed by your surging curiosity.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>身为男人心中可望而不可及的存在，您已陪伴他走过不尽其数的岁月，自然也有权利纵观时间的长河，见证他抵达此地后迎来的，每一个荒谬而可悲的结局。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As an unattainable existence that has dwelled within his heart, beyond his reach, you have accompanied him through the march of years uncounted, you naturally have the right to view the river of time in its fullness, and to witness what he welcomed upon his arrival here, every absurd and tragic ending.</color>

t_ch: 无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
t_en: None of that matters now. This brutal Flame-Chase Journey has stripped away my delusions. I know the future isn't some peaceful paradise with gentle west winds, just waiting to welcome us to step in...

t_ch: 这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事……
t_en: This will be a romantic story like none that has come before...

t_ch: 你也是这么想的，对吧？
t_en: You think so too, right?

t_ch: 这是…白厄和昔涟的后续？
t_en: This is... the rest of Phainon and Cyrene's story?

t_ch: 似乎在哪里见过这段对话…
t_en: Haven't I... seen this scene before?

t_ch: 是啊，在男人的记忆中，如此情景曾反复上演。虽然略有出入，但万变不离其宗：{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹」……</color>{RUBY_E#}
t_en: Indeed! In his memories, such a scene replays over and over. Though the details may differ, this remains ever the same: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle..."</color>{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>…共计<unbreak>33550335</unbreak>次。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...A total of <unbreak>33,550,335</unbreak> times.</color>

t_ch: 它们都是岁月长河的片段，代表他从此踏上的漫长征程，或者换一种说法……
t_en: Each is a drop from the river of time, representing the long journey he would take, or rather...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「永无止境的轮回」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...the never-ending cycle.</color>

t_ch: 「轮回」？
t_en: What cycle?

t_ch: 呵呵，这是便于您理解的说辞。
t_en: Hehe, just putting it in terms that might be easier for you to understand.

t_ch: 我就知道…
t_en: I knew it...

t_ch: 呵呵，毕竟阁下聪颖过人。
t_en: Hehe, sharp as ever, I see.

t_ch: 眼见为实，不妨用您的双眼一探究竟吧。
t_en: Seeing is believing. Why not let your own two eyes uncover the truth?

t_ch: 亦或者，您可以直接迈向最后的真相：<color=#dbc291ff>一睹您所扮演的角色真容，并见证黄金裔、逐火之旅与翁法罗斯轮回的终极本质。</color>
t_en: Or perhaps, you can simply walk straight to the final truth: <color=#dbc291ff>See the true face of the character you play, and witness the ultimate nature of the Chrysos Heirs, Flame-Chase Journey, and the cycles of Amphoreus.</color>

t_ch: 空无一人啊。这就是末日的创世涡心……
t_en: Not a single soul to be seen. So this is how the Vortex looks at the end of days...

t_ch: 呵…竟然还有人愿意陪我作伴。但，既然你还是出现在了这里……
t_en: Hehe... Looks like I've got company after all. But since you've made it here...

t_ch: 看来，你终究得逞了……
t_en: So, in the end, you succeeded...

t_ch: …刽子手。
t_en: ...Executioner.

t_ch: 少废话，快走！
t_en: Just shut up and get out of here!

t_ch: 你疯了，万敌！哪怕你是不死之身，哪怕你已成为「纷争」的半神……
t_en: Are you crazy, Mydei!? Immortal or not, even if you're the demigod of Strife...

t_ch: …我也绝不是它们的对手？
t_en: ...I'm still no match for them?

t_ch: 不，我相信你。我只想请求你，与我共同见证「再创世」……
t_en: No, I know you can... I just wanted to request that you witness the Era Nova with me.

t_ch: 与我一同证明…你我足以超越神谕的命运。
t_en: Together, let's prove... that we're enough to transcend the prophesized fate.

t_ch: 可笑。难不成，我们的「救世主」竟在这种关键时刻掉链子，被那愚蠢的谵语吓破了胆？
t_en: Ha! Could it be, that now, at the critical juncture, our mighty "Deliverer" is chickening out? Scared of a stupid prophecy?

t_ch: 我会超越神谕的命运，但我有个更好的主意：身为歌耳戈之子，何不让我用一场壮绝的胜利证明自己，正如我过去撕开悬锋先王的胸膛？
t_en: I'll transcend the prophesized fate, alright, but I've got a better way: As the son of Gorgo, I'll prove myself with one last grand victory, just like when I ripped out the old king's heart!

t_ch: 去吧，这里交给我。如果黑潮造物足以淹没天际，那我们悬锋人就会在黑夜下作战——
t_en: Go, leave this to me. If the black tide creatures block out the sun, then we Kremnoans will fight in the shade—

t_ch: ——待我手刃了那刽子手，就让我们在西风尽头把酒言欢吧。
t_en: And when I'm done with that executioner, we'll raise our cups where the west winds end.

t_ch: 创世涡心…上次来到这里，还是归还「理性」火种的时候。
t_en: The Vortex of Genesis... The last time I was here, I was returning the Coreflame of "Reason."

t_ch: 当时没来得及仔细感受——你们口中所谓泰坦憩息的圣所，我看倒更像是它们冰冷的灵柩。
t_en: I didn't have the time to observe it in too much detail back then — but a "holy sanctuary" of the Titans? Looks more like their frozen crypt to me.

t_ch: 毕竟，诸神的火种如今皆已收殓于此……
t_en: Well, all the Coreflames do lie here now...

t_ch: …能与您这样的哲人同行最后一段路，是我的荣幸，那刻夏老师。
t_en: It's my honor to walk the final stretch with a mind such as yours, Professor.

t_ch: 哼，说什么蠢话？
t_en: Oho, getting ahead of ourselves, are we?

t_ch: 忘了吗？我早已为真理献身，如今与你同行的，不过是你头脑中一道思想罢了。
t_en: Have you forgotten so quickly? I died for truth long ago. What walks with you now is but a thought in your mind.

t_ch: 是啊…我怎么会忘记？
t_en: Of course... how could I forget that?

t_ch: 但，你的话我原模原样回敬给你：能与你同行最后一段路，也是我的荣幸。
t_en: But I'll say the same to you: it's my honor to walk this final stretch with you, too.

t_ch: 现在，去吧。别垂头丧气，做好你该做的最后一件事——
t_en: Now go. Stand tall and finish your final task—

t_ch: 嗯，交给我吧……
t_en: Yeah, just leave it to me...

t_ch: 让那可悲的刽子手…血债血偿。
t_en: Time for that wretched executioner... to pay what they owe.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟嘟。
t_en: Doot... Doot-Doot.

t_ch: 小家伙…你在害怕吗？
t_en: Hey, little one... are you scared?

t_ch: 嘟！嘟嘟。
t_en: Doot! Doot-Doot!

t_ch: 呵…你和风堇一样坚强。跟上我吧，小伊卡……
t_en: Hehe... as brave as Hyacine. Stay close, Little Ica...

t_ch: 嘟，嘟嘟。
t_en: Doot, doot-doot.

t_ch: 什么？连你也……
t_en: What? No, not... not you too...

t_ch: 嘟嘟，嘟。
t_en: Doot-Doot, doot.

t_ch: …我明白了。我不会辜负你的好意…你们的心愿。
t_en: ...I see. I won't squander your kindness... your hopes.

t_ch: 那，就请为我支撑起这一方小小天空吧——
t_en: So, please keep this bit of sky standing for me—

t_ch: 嘟！嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot! Doot-Doot!

t_ch: 呵，看来「再创世」前，还有件事不得不完成啊……
t_en: Well, now there's one last thing I need to do before the Era Nova...

t_ch: …来吧，刽子手。这片晴空将为我照亮刀锋。
t_en: Come, executioner. Let this patch of clear sky show me where to strike.

t_ch: 啧啧，到处是水。这地方永远都湿漉漉、黏糊糊的，连尾巴都变得很重……
t_en: Ugh, there's water everywhere. This place is always all wet and sticky, even my tail's getting heavy...

t_ch: 再加上烧焦的气味，还有那个呲啦呲啦的噪音…恐怕没一个多洛斯人能受得了哪。
t_en: Plus that burnt smell and that sizzling noise... Yikes, nobody from Dolos could stand this.

t_ch: …你也感觉到了。
t_en: ...So you feel it too.

t_ch: 去吧，脏东西留给我，做你该做的事。
t_en: Go on then, I'll handle the filth. Do what you need to do.

t_ch: 让我和你一起，二对一胜算更大。
t_en: Let me fight with you. Better odds with two.

t_ch: 忘记裁缝女说的话了？我相信你拎得清孰轻孰重。
t_en: Hey, remember what the seamstress said? You know what really matters.
Yeah...

t_ch: …就交给你了。
t_en: ...I'll leave it to you then.

t_ch: 还真不客气。丑话说在前面，我可从来不做赔本买卖……
t_en: Wow, someone's not shy. Just so you know, I'm not in the business of making losing deals...

t_ch: 我来拖住那刽子手，你去把{RUBY_B#神谕}此世最大的谎言{RUBY_E#}圆上——然后，就让我成为新世界的第一缕风吧。
t_en: I'll distract that executioner — you go turn {RUBY_B#prophecy}the world's biggest lie{RUBY_E#} into truth. Let me become the first wind of your new world.

t_ch: 遐蝶？你不是已经……
t_en: Castorice? Didn't you...

t_ch: 是啊，我已成为「死亡」之半神，再也无法漫步人间。因此你所看到的，不过是这生灵涂炭的末日之世，无数死者汇成的冥河，它汹涌的涛声。
t_en: Yes, I've become Death's demigod, and shall never again walk the world of the living. What you see is the surging of the River of Souls, brought on by the countless dead feeding it in these dark times.

t_ch: 他们正在呐喊：即便身陨，也愿汇成洪流，拱卫创世涡心，让「再创世」付诸实现。
t_en: They cry out: Though dead, they'll converge into a torrent and guard the Vortex, to see the Era Nova fulfilled.

t_ch: 亡灵们的心愿，我也会尽数收下。既然如此，就请各位和我一起，战斗到最后一刻吧。
t_en: I will take all the wishes of the departed with me. Please, everyone, fight with me, to the very last.

t_ch: 我听到：死者们在为你喝彩…他们已经做好准备了。
t_en: I hear them: The dead hail you... they're prepared.

t_ch: 走吧，救世主，就让那刽子手留在我们的阴影中——你的前路将是光明，和永恒不熄的烈火。
t_en: Go on, Deliverer. We'll keep that executioner in our shadows — the path before you leads to light and eternal flames.

t_ch: 缇宝老师，看哪…我们已经到创世涡心了。
t_en: Tribbie, look... we made it to the Vortex.

t_ch: 那神谕中描摹的明天，西风尽头的花海，「再创世」…很快就能实现……
t_en: That prophesized future, the flower fields where the west wind ends, Era Nova... we're so close now...

t_ch: 已经…没有回应了吗？
t_en: You... can't speak anymore?

t_ch: 但…至少，请允许我在兑现誓约前，先暂缓脚步——
t_en: Please... allow me to pause just a moment before I keep my promise—

t_ch: 让我将那刽子手的心脏从无形中取出，告慰你苦痛的命运吧。
t_en: Let me answer your cruel fate by tearing that executioner's heart from the void.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」}「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然……」{RUBY_E#}
t_en: {RUBY_B#Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova}"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate."{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: 看来，泰坦揭示的未来也未必会实现。
t_en: So, even the future revealed by the Titans may not come to pass.

t_ch: 「再创世」…这件至美的作品，能够交由我最信任的学徒收针，我已没有遗憾。
t_en: The Era Nova... this unrivaled masterpiece, I have no regrets, now that I may entrust it to my most trusted apprentice.

t_ch: 您这话的意思是……
t_en: Are you saying...

t_ch: 命运从来颠扑不破。金线告诉我，黑潮正在向创世涡心涌来，很快便将吞没此地。我必须将最后的人性结成丝网，抵御洪流……
t_en: Fate is ever unassailable. The golden threads tell me the black tide rushes toward the Vortex, ready to swallow this place. I must weave the last of my humanity into a net to hold back the deluge...

t_ch: 「我将最后一次沐浴，在温热耀眼的黄金中」——现在，是时候将其兑现了。
t_en: "I shall have my final bath in warm and radiant gold." — Now, the hour of fulfillment has come.

t_ch: 原谅我吧：我必须翦除一切隐患，为新世界编织最坚韧的未来。
t_en: Forgive me. I must snip away every risk, to weave the strongest future for the new world.

t_ch: 言尽于此，该分别了。我会亲自料理那些可悲的刽子手——不以金丝，而以针锋。
t_en: There is nothing more to say. We part here. I shall personally dispatch that wretched executioner — not with threads of gold, but with the steel tip of a needle.

t_ch: 呵呵，您当真准备好了？容我郑重提醒：一旦您揭开记忆的真容……
t_en: Hehe, you really think you're prepared? Allow me to give you a warning most earnest: Once you see what these memories hide...

t_ch: 世界的进程，便再无回头的可能了。
t_en: The world's course... will be forever irreversible.

t_ch: 唤起最后的记忆。
t_en: Show me the final memory.

t_ch: 既然阁下心意已决，那便让我们共同见证吧。
t_en: Very well. As you have made up your mind, let us bear witness together.

t_ch: 身为这永恒剧场唯一的观众，我一直在恭候您的莅临，这也是为什么我必须向您展示这一切。
t_en: As the sole audience of this eternal theater, I have been rapturously awaiting your arrival. And this too is the very reason I must show you everything.

t_ch: 我相信，既然阁下沐浴过<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>的瞥视——
t_en: I believe that, since you've bathed in <color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon's gaze</color>—

t_ch: 您就一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运，再度流动……
t_en: You can make Amphoreus's frozen fate flow once again...

t_ch: 还不是时候。
t_en: Not yet.

t_ch: 明白了，我就在此地等候。
t_en: Very well, I'll be here. Waiting.

t_ch: 感到不知所措么？如您所见，此情此景正是戏剧《翁法罗斯》的最后篇章……
t_en: Feeling a bit lost? As you now see, this scene marks the final act of the drama "Amphoreus"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>男人一手缔造，也是这个世界即将迎来的最后一次「永劫回归」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The final Eternal Recurrence created by this man's hand, and the last one this world shall undergo.</color>

t_ch: 请看：那立于剑士身侧的，正是他时而称为伙伴、时而称作战友，那在历史中杳无踪迹的「无名英雄」——
t_en: Behold. At the swordsman's side stands one he has sometimes called companion, other times comrade, that Nameless Hero absent from the annals of history —

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>{M#他}{F#她}就是少年儿时的憧憬，幻想中引领自己毅然前进的「救世主」——现在，以「无名客」的名义，{M#他}{F#她}已然成为翁法罗斯史诗不可或缺的一部分。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>{M#He}{F#She} is the swordsman's ideal in his youth, the "Deliverer" that guided him resolutely onward through fantasy — And now, in the name of the "Nameless," {F#s}he has become an essential and inseparable part of the epic of Amphoreus.</color>

t_ch: 这一次，在{M#他}{F#她}的指引下，英雄将作出如何抉择，全世命运又将流向何方？还有，翁法罗斯一切的终极本质又是什么？……
t_en: And this time, under {M#his}{F#her} guidance, what choice shall the hero make? Whither shall the fate of the world flow? And what is the ultimate truth of the nature of Amphoreus...?

t_ch: 还有许多悬念尚未落地。但，就请允许我暂且退居幕后，掌声有请另一名更加合适的人选：他将为您揭晓答案，并带来第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次逐火之旅的终局——
t_en: There are many mysteries yet to be unwound. But, if I may, allow me to temporarily yield the stage to one far more fitting. Please, put your hands together and give a rousing round of applause for they who will reveal the answers, and bring about the final end of the <unbreak>33550336</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>他就是方才无数记忆的主人，此时此刻踏入涡心的另一位贵客，已将自我燃成焦炭的——盗火行者！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The master of the countless memories we saw, the other important actor now stepping into the Vortex, they who have already burnt their own self to cinder — the Flame Reaver!</color>

t_ch: 清爽多了吧？走，找昔涟去。
t_en: All awake now? Great, let's go see Cyrene.

t_ch: 白厄，要去哪里？昔涟没和你一起吗？
t_en: Hey Phainon! Where you headed? No Cyrene today?

t_ch: 哈哈，我正要去找她呢！
t_en: That's exactly where I'm going!

t_ch: 白厄哥哥，教我像你一样挥剑吧！
t_en: Phainon, show me how to use a sword like you do!

t_ch: 再等等吧，等你再长高一点！
t_en: Wait till you grow a bit more!

t_ch: 村子就这么大，当年藏下的童年秘密都还在原地吧？
t_en: In a village this size, I bet all our childhood treasures are exactly where we hid them.

t_ch: 嗯，时间一定在好好保管它们。
t_en: Mm-hmm, time must be keeping them safe for us.

t_ch: 神谕牌不在这里呢……
t_en: No sign of the oracle cards...

t_ch: 让我想想…啊，还有一个地方没去找过。
t_en: Let's see... Ah! There's one place we haven't checked yet.

t_ch: （楼上的风景，还没见过…上去看看吧？）
t_en: (I wonder what the view's like from up there... Worth checking out?)

t_ch: 是这么走的吗？应该没错……
t_en: Pretty sure this is it... Should be this way...

t_ch: 还真钻进来了，不容易…都记不得上次来是什么时候了。
t_en: I made it! That wasn't easy... I can't remember the last time I came here.

t_ch: 那时我们都是小孩子呢。
t_en: We were still kids back then.

t_ch: 咦？你们是……
t_en: Wait a minute... Are you...

t_ch: 迷！原来是小涟、小白呀！
t_en: Look who it is! Reney and Snowy!

t_ch: …我知道了！大家跟上我。
t_en: ...That's it! This way, everyone.

t_ch: 树干潮湿，小心别滑下去啦。
t_en: Watch your step, the trunk's slippery!

t_ch: 农田刚翻整过呢……
t_en: Someone's been working the field recently...

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我们最近引进了很好吃的「刺刺球」哦！
t_en: Heehee~ We're growing these yummy "Quillorbs" now!

t_ch: 村长大人！小涟和小白回来啦——
t_en: Chief! Reney and Snowy have returned—

t_ch: 那么，请上前吧。
t_en: Now, if you would.

t_ch: 「再创世」的道路，我已行尽……
t_en: My journey to the Era Nova... it ends here...

t_ch: 哼，惟一人能见证「再创世」又何妨？
t_en: Hmph! So what if there's only one person left to witness the Era Nova?

t_ch: 言尽于此。去吧，代我完成「再创世」。
t_en: Enough talk. Go, make the Era Nova happen in my stead.

t_ch: 待到「再创世」后，天空也将放晴。
t_en: When the Era Nova comes, the skies will clear again.

t_ch: 真是寒碜的「再创世」啊，救世小子。
t_en: Now this is one sorry excuse for an Era Nova, Deliverer boy.

t_ch: 我相信…「再创世」的彼岸是一片花海。
t_en: I just know... Beyond the Era Nova lies a sea of flowers.

t_ch: 小白，就请你代*我们*实现「再创世」吧！
t_en: Go on, Snowy. Make the Era Nova happen for all of us!

t_ch: 救世主啊，即使孑然一身，也请你成就「再创世」的伟业。
t_en: O Deliverer, though you walk alone, please complete the work of bringing about the Era Nova.

t_ch: 请阁下自便，随意阅览。
t_en: Please, take your time. Look around as much as you wish.

t_ch: 我也想和你们一起玩！
t_en: I wanna play with you guys too!

t_ch: 年轻就是有活力啊。
t_en: Youth is always brimming with energy.

t_ch: 天气真不错，玩得开心！
t_en: The weather's great today, have fun!

t_ch: 孩子们，慢点，别摔着了！
t_en: Slow down, kids! You'll trip!

t_ch: 谢谢您！我们会注意的。
t_en: Thank you! We'll be careful!

t_ch: 我能在这儿钓一整天的鱼……
t_en: I could just fish here all day...

t_ch: 白厄！昔涟！
t_en: Phainon! Cyrene!

t_ch: 看，他们回来啦！
t_en: Look, they're back!

t_ch: 好久不见！
t_en: Long time no see!

t_ch: 欢迎回来！
t_en: Welcome back!

t_ch: 想死你们啦！
t_en: We missed you so much!

t_ch: 不知道石榴汁加奶味道如何……
t_en: I wonder how pomegranate juice with milk would taste...

t_ch: 不会在最上层罐子里吧……
t_en: It's not in the jar on the topmost shelf, is it...?

t_ch: 别了，{NICKNAME}。现在，我将兑现我最后的命运。
t_en: Farewell, {NICKNAME}. This is where I fulfill my final destiny.

t_ch: 「救世主」的神谕，于我已无意义。它应当被交予更合适的人手中，也就是你。
t_en: The prophecy of the "Deliverer" means nothing to me now. It belongs in the hands of someone far more fitting. Someone like you.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>卡厄斯兰那，背负混沌之人</color>，此名非一人所有，它是神话中刻法勒的化身，亦是「英雄」的代名词。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Khaslana, the name of one who bears chaos</color>, does not belong to a single person. Rather, it is the embodiment of the mythical Kephale and a symbol of all heroes.

t_ch: 诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>白厄</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>汝</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>将肩负骄阳，直至</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>开拓者</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>灰白的黎明</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>显著」</color>——在你亲手谱写的史诗中，愿这名号能代我同行。
t_en: As the prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Phainon</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>You</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>will bear the blazing sun, until</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Trailblazer</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>the pale dawn</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>breaks."</color> May the name accompany you in my place in the epic you write with your own hands.

t_ch: 又一次尝试，又一次失败。
t_en: Another attempt. Another failure.
